overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's neon-lit downtown district. The player character traverses wet streets reflecting colorful holographic advertisements, passes street vendors and pedestrians, and ascends stairs to a main thoroughfare lined with pink neon storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with towering circular advertisement structure

events.description: camera tilts down from vertical view of the circular tower to horizontal street level

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza looking up at the towering advertisement structure then proceeding forward toward the street

entered.detail: tall cylindrical skyscraper with rotating neon advertisements and glowing red rings at the top
large pink neon sign reading HOTEL with Japanese characters below it
reflective tiled ground showing colorful neon reflections from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of a towering circular advertisement structure against the night sky. The camera tilts down to street level, revealing a wet plaza with reflective pavement. The player walks forward through the open space, passing sparse pedestrians, with a prominent pink neon hotel sign visible on the left and various holographic billboards illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with vendors and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking past storefronts and street vendors while navigating around parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking across the path

entered.detail: rotating display rack covered with colorful magazine and comic book covers
dark colored utility van parked along the curb
building entrance framed with bright cyan neon tube lighting

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the open plaza into a narrower commercial street lined with parked vehicles and vendor stalls. A rotating magazine rack stands prominently on the right, while neon-lit storefronts line the left. The street feels more enclosed with buildings blocking the sky, and the wet concrete reflects the cyan and pink neon lights. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including one in distinctive red pants crossing the path.

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs toward upper street level

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass and climbing stairs to reach the upper level street

entered.detail: massive concrete structure spanning overhead with red accent lighting
red and white industrial utility box with warning stripes
concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward to the next level
pink neon hotel sign becoming visible again at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered underpass area beneath a massive concrete overpass structure. The lighting becomes darker and more mixed with shadows. Trash bags and debris line the walkway. The player approaches and begins ascending a concrete stairway, with the pink neon hotel sign becoming visible again at the top of the stairs, guiding the way upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: main downtown thoroughfare with traffic and neon storefronts

events.description: crossing the street at yellow striped crosswalk with moving traffic

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk and proceeding along the sidewalk past neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: building with bright pink neon trim and TENGU signage glowing intensely
yellow striped pedestrian crossing on the wet asphalt
tropical palm tree near the intersection
the tall circular advertisement tower visible again in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs onto the upper level, the player crosses a busy downtown street at a yellow crosswalk. The scene opens into a wide thoroughfare with moderate traffic including a yellow taxi. On the left, a building with intense pink neon trim and TENGU signage dominates the sidewalk. The circular ad tower from the beginning reappears in the distance as the player walks along the reflective wet pavement, surrounded by scattered pedestrians and glowing holographic advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban district, moving from a wide open plaza through a claustrophobic underpass and finally ascending to a bustling upper thoroughfare. It begins with a dramatic tilt down from a towering circular advertisement to a wet, reflective plaza illuminated by holographic billboards and a prominent pink hotel sign. As the camera moves forward, the open space narrows into a commercial street lined with vendor stalls and parked vehicles, where the sky is blocked by buildings and the pavement glows with cyan and pink reflections. The scene then shifts into the shadows of a semi-covered underpass filled with debris before the camera ascends a concrete stairway, guided by the reappearance of the pink neon signage above. Finally, the view opens onto a busy upper-level street with a yellow crosswalk and flowing traffic, ending as the player walks past intense pink TENGU signage toward the distant circular ad tower.
